blocks.content: The movie started with the projector's characteristic flicker — one long stuttering second and then there it was, huge and silver on the park screen.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I thought classic meant really good, not really old.
Kit stretched out on the grass with his arms behind his head. Daisy sat cross-legged beside him.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I didn't say you didn't tell me.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I implied I didn't know who he was. That's different.
He thought about that. She was right.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I just don't want it to end.
She looked at the screen. On the grass between them, her hand was three inches from his.
